questions: What is the patient's exact age in years?
Does the patient present with acute onset of flaccid paralysis without obvious cause? (Yes/No)
Is the paralysis onset less than 4 weeks ago? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have isolated single lower limb involvement? (Yes/No)
Is the reporting done after 4 days of onset of paralysis? (Yes/No)
Is the paralysis not progressing for more than 48 hours? (Yes/No)
Is the paralysis of upper limbs less than 3 days old? (Yes/No)
